description: Classic and glitz make a wonderful combination in this black dial, large face multi-function watch. It transitions perfectly from day to night. This new range of watches are a fresh take on the esprit eye for perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel and black textured straps Logo at the 6-hour mark Tang clasp with a black round dial, metallic numbers and metallic hands Date aperture at the 4-hour mark Polished hands mark sub dials Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming Comes with authentic collectible tin
